name: Verify that user can successfully log in with valid credentials

parameters.name: bodyRequest
parameters.value: CreateProjectRequest(title=Pagac-Ebert, code=QA63, description=Quia quisquam rerum natus iusto doloribus., access=none, group=MANUAL)

parameters.name: bodyRequest
parameters.value: CreateProjectRequest(title=Metz Inc, code=QA44, description=Consequatur velit at., access=all, group=MANUAL)

parameters.name: bodyRequest
parameters.value: CreateProjectRequest(title=Jerde Group, code=QA38, description=Similique tenetur sit iusto doloribus assumenda., access=all, group=QA)

parameters.name: bodyRequest
parameters.value: CreateProjectRequest(title=Blick, Parisian and Baumbach, code=QA19, description=Quae adipisci quis rem non sed., access=none, group=DEV)

parameters.name: bodyRequest
parameters.value: CreateProjectRequest(title=Pagac Group, code=QA88, description=Ab excepturi placeat., access=none, group=MANUAL)

parameters.name: bodyRequest
parameters.value: CreateProjectRequest(title=Daniel-Sanford, code=QA09, description=Dolor iusto unde iure., access=none, group=QA)

steps.name: Check that login page is opened
$("by text: Log in to your account") should be(visible (because Login page title should be displayed when login page is opened))
Check that projects page is opened

labels.name: story
labels.value: User logs in with valid credentials
